'''EX-1-8''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]]<ref name="TCG" /> that was manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]].<ref name="DB" /> As a [[TIE series/Legends|TIE/sa]] [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]], EX-1-8 carried a destructive payload consisting of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]], guided [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], [[Space mine/Legends|space mines]], and free-falling [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]].<ref name="TCG" /> Around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Note">The [[The Empire Strikes Back (TCG)|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] set of the ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]'' takes place around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of {{Film|V}}, which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> EX-1-8 flew through the [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth asteroid field]].<ref name="TCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
EX-1-8 originated as a prop for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] TIE/sa bomber, which made its cinematic debut in the [[1980]] [[original trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="SWIJ">''[[From Star Wars to Indiana Jones: The Best of the Lucasfilm Archives]]''</ref> An image of the prop was used in [[2003]] on a card for the [[The Empire Strikes Back (TCG)|''Empire Strikes Back'']] expansion set of the ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]'', coining the name EX-1-8 and establishing the individual TIE/sa bomber's existence in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="TCG" />
